title: Inscription for Marye's Heights, Fredericksburg.
content:
To them who crossed the flood
 And climbed the hill, with eyes
 Upon the heavenly flag intent,
 And through the deathful tumult went
 Even unto death: to them this Stone - 
 Erect, where they were overthrown - 
 Of more than victory the monument.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Herman Melville, titled "Inscription for Marye's Heights, Fredericksburg.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
